title: API Integration Timeout
description: Customer reporting that the external API sync is consistently timing out after 30 seconds. Affecting real-time dashboard updates.

title: Mobile App Crashing on Startup
description: The iOS version of the app crashes immediately upon opening for users on version 17.2. Clearing cache did not resolve.

title: Broken Link in Welcome Email
description: The 'Verify Account' button in the automated registration email leads to a 404 error page.

title: Request for Dark Mode
description: User is inquiring if there is a dark mode setting available for the web portal to reduce eye strain.

title: Duplicate Subscription Charges
description: Customer was billed twice for the Premium monthly plan on Feb 1st. Requesting a refund for the second transaction.

title: Search Filter Not Updating
description: Applying the 'Date Range' filter in the reports section does not refresh the data table results.

title: Typo in FAQ Documentation
description: There is a spelling error in the third paragraph of the 'Security' section in the help center.

title: Export to CSV Failing
description: Attempting to export the customer list results in a 'Server Error 500'. Only happens with lists over 500 rows.

title: Two-Factor Auth Not Sending SMS
description: User is not receiving the 6-digit verification code on their registered mobile device. Tried three times.

title: Profile Picture Upload Error
description: User receives an 'Invalid File Format' error when trying to upload a standard .jpg headshot.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading Times
description: Main dashboard takes over 10 seconds to populate widgets. Customer has a high-speed fiber connection.

title: Update Seat Count for Enterprise
description: Customer needs to add 5 more seats to their current Enterprise plan before the next billing cycle.
